svg.title: JARVIS component interaction diagram
svg.desc: Three-column architecture. Left: input sources — voice with Whisper STT, browser extension, activity monitor. Center: processing core — NLP intent parser, Claude API engine, action dispatcher, SQLite database. Right: execution layer — macro engine, TTS engine, Tauri UI shell, scheduler. Arrows show data flow.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the JARVIS voice pipeline work from microphone to parsed intent?')
sendPrompt('How does the JARVIS browser extension capture tab and dwell time, and how is it installed?')
sendPrompt('What exactly does the JARVIS activity monitor measure, how often does it sample, and what does it write to the database?')
sendPrompt('How does the NLP intent parser classify JARVIS voice commands and what does it return to the action dispatcher?')
sendPrompt('How does JARVIS use the Claude API — what prompts are sent, what context is included, and how are responses handled?')
sendPrompt('What is the action dispatcher in JARVIS and what is the exact routing logic for each intent type?')
sendPrompt('What are all the SQLite tables in the JARVIS database schema with their columns and indexes?')
sendPrompt('How does the JARVIS macro engine safely launch apps and arrange windows — what is the whitelist mechanism?')
sendPrompt('Which TTS engines does JARVIS support and how does voice output work end to end?')
sendPrompt('What does the JARVIS Tauri UI shell render — the tray menu, brain dump overlay, and analytics dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does the JARVIS APScheduler trigger morning briefings, reminders, and dynamic re-routing?')
